"251 kilometers between us… but you're still part of my everyday."

Chapter One

Our Story

April 4, 2022

The day Nazu came into my life

I still remember that moment. I told you I like you, not really knowing what would happen. And when you said it back… yeah, something just shifted. Like everything felt different after that. I was way happier than I expected to be. That was the moment my world quietly changed and it’s been you ever since.

Late nights, my favourite nights

Late night calls that felt too short

Hours dissolved like minutes. The distance disappeared in those calls and your voice always felt like home. I never wanted to hang up. Not even once.

Counting the days

The longing that only made it stronger

Distance, but still us

Saying goodbye always sucked. But every time I saw you again, it felt right again. Distance did its thing… but we didn’t fall apart. We stayed tight and That’s what matters.

.

The in-betweens

The fights that made us stronger

Yeah, we fought. Misunderstood each other, said things we didn’t mean. There were moments it didn’t feel easy at all. But we still came back. Still chose to fix it, instead of ending it forever.

A quiet realization

The moment I realized I can't lose her

At some point, it just hit me. The idea of losing you didn’t make sense anymore. It never did actually. That’s when I realized how deep it got. You had become part of how I breathe. That's why I call you by amar "Jaan".

2022 — 2026

Moments I'd Relive

2026

from the heart

A Letter to Nazu

💌

Dear jaan Nazu,

From the day you came into my life, I started feeling things I didn't expect. I don’t even know how to explain it properly, but you slowly became part of everything. My comfort, my peace… the person I go to without thinking twice. Even with 251 kilometers between us, you never really felt far. Your voice, your messages,your smile, your efforts that I'm always grateful for, the moments we got to see each other… those were enough for me. More than enough, actually. I don’t see these years as just “time”. These are memories I would go back to again and again without even thinking. We had our ups and downs. We both know that. But even after everything, one thing never changed for me - I choose you. Not just once. Not just sometimes. Every time. And I love you way beyond infinity jaan. And yes, infinity can't even reach there.

— Rafin
